meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no version control (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Onboarding & Version Control for AI Apps
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to implement robust user onboarding and version control workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance business.
content.answer_block: Version control is the bedrock of professional development. By integrating automated user onboarding, you capture state and user feedback, turning chaotic manual processes into structured, versioned deployments. Use Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code to maintain clean, traceable commit histories that protect your client's production environment from regression.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: 3 AM, a client is screaming about a broken feature, and you’re staring at a single folder of unversioned, spaghetti code. You lack a safety net, and the lack of a structured onboarding flow means users are bouncing before they even understand your value proposition. It’s a recipe for burnout and lost revenue.

But what if you could treat every freelance build like a high-stakes enterprise project? By marrying automated onboarding flows with strict versioning practices, you transform from a 'coder for hire' into a 'systems architect.' This checklist leverages modern AI tooling to ensure your work is bulletproof, scalable, and impossible to lose.

steps.title: Establish the Versioned Repository
steps.description: Initialize a professional Git structure that mirrors your project's architectural modules before writing a single line of feature code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust directory structure for a SaaS application including /src, /docs, /tests, and /onboarding, initialized with a .gitignore tailored for modern web stacks.

steps.title: Architect the Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Design a modular onboarding state machine that tracks user progress, allowing you to roll back specific onboarding steps if a client request changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React-based onboarding wizard component that utilizes a state machine for tracking step completion and saves progress to a local JSON manifest.

steps.title: Implement Automated Change Tracking
steps.description: Use Claude Code to enforce commit message standards that clearly link code changes to specific onboarding requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a pre-commit hook that validates commit messages against the Conventional Commits specification and checks for missing documentation updates.

steps.title: Deploy Instrumented Feedback Loops
steps.description: Embed telemetry within the onboarding flow to catch errors before they manifest as client-facing support tickets.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an error-handling middleware that logs onboarding failure states to a versioned log file, allowing for easy reproduction and debugging.

steps.title: Perform a Version-Controlled Handover
steps.description: Generate a 'Project Bible' automatically from your versioned commits to ensure the client understands the state of the app upon delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README.md that aggregates all version tags, installation instructions, and onboarding flow documentation from the repository.

pro_tips: Always use atomic commits for onboarding steps; it makes reverting a broken user flow trivial.
Tag your production releases with the specific onboarding version to isolate bugs by user cohort.
Use Claude Code to auto-generate JSDoc comments for every state transition in your onboarding flow.
Maintain a 'shadow' branch for experimental onboarding UI changes, keeping your main branch strictly stable.
Automate your daily changelog generation to impress clients with visibility into your progress.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Run a full audit of your current project using 'claude scan' to identify any unversioned files, then migrate them into your new repository structure immediately.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping with the confidence of a lead engineer. Master the tools that turn chaos into high-value, versioned, and scalable client deliverables. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
